title: FatHopes Energy and AmSpec Group Collaborate to Boost Sustainable Aviation Fuel Production in Asia Pacific
content: Malaysiaâ€™s pioneer biofuel feedstock aggregator, FatHopes Energy Sdn Bhd (FHE), signed a Memorandum of Agreement (MoA) with AmSpec Group, a leading service provider in the testing, inspection, and certification (TIC) sector, to enhance the efficiency and scalability of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) production across the region. The collaboration aims to develop a comprehensive feedstock library and discovery initiative across Asia, Australia, and New Zealand by identifying, assessing, and documenting various feedstock sources that can be utilized in the SAF refinery currently under development by FHE.
author: Analysts Account
